---
title: "AE-1: R Basics"
editor: visual
output-file: html
---

## Writing "Text"

```{r}

```

## Writing Numbers

```{r}

```

## Basic Calculations {.smaller}

```{r}

# addition


# subtraction


# multipilication


# division


# exponent


```

## Comments

```{r}

```

## Creating Objects {.smaller}

```{r}

```

## Data Types

```{r}

```

## Packages

```{r}

```
